page.name: Sync Session: Introductions
page.intro: Sync Session: Two Truths and a Lie (Introduction)
page.content:
Using a shared collaborative document (ex: GDoc, Etherpad, etc), please list three interesting things about yourself.

Ex: I own two iguanas; I once shook hands with Tom Cruise; and I love to waterski.

Two entries must be lies and one must be true.

After you have finished writing your lists, an online poll will be taken for each list to gauge participant's opinions on which items in the lists are truths.

Authors of the each list will reveal which entry is true and which 2 are lies after each poll.
